name: chr14p_acrocentric_short_arm
description: Chromosome 14 short arm (14p), an acrocentric short arm composed of alpha-satellite, beta-satellite, 45S rDNA NOR and gamma-like sequences. Site of recurrent Robertsonian translocation breakpoints. Mostly unassembled in GRCh38; resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Acrocentric short-arm architecture shared with chr13/15/21/22; alpha-sat -> beta-sat -> NOR -> stalk; rDNA copy number variable per individual.

related_diseases: rob(13;14) most common Robertsonian in humans
